title: Standard Library Problem Solving · Language Clinic: Python Re Patterns
summary: Add time, statistics, secure identifiers, text search, process, and logging features to the data tool. Planned artifact: Add and verify the python re patterns increment in a standard-library operations toolkit. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Compile and test regular expressions with groups, boundaries, flags, escaping, and pathological-input awareness.
Use random for simulation and secrets for security-sensitive tokens while controlling reproducibility where appropriate.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
